text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning and start my day with a glass of water and a short stretching routine. After a quick breakfast, I leave for work around 8:00. My job keeps me busy until 5:00 PM, and I usually have lunch at my desk. In the evening, I go for a 30-minute run or do some yoga at home. After that, I prepare dinner and relax by reading or watching a show. I try to be in bed by 10:30. This routine helps me stay healthy and productive. Consistency is the key to making it work.
